name: Hello World
description: A minimal Hello World plugin demonstrating the basics of the Oryn Plugin SDK. Perfect starting point for new plugin developers.
author: Your Name

config.readme:
# Hello World Plugin

The simplest possible Oryn plugin. Perfect for learning the Plugin SDK.

## What it demonstrates

- Registering a plugin with permissions
- Creating a page with hero and stats sections
- Adding a runnable action
- Publishing a marketplace listing

## Files

- `manifest.json` — Plugin registration metadata
- `extensions.json` — All plugin extensions
- `marketplace.json` — Marketplace listing for publishing
